items.desc: Tea Vilgain Pu-Erh tea, 50 g:Vilgain Pu-Erh tealoose black tea, 50 gVilgain Pu-Erh Tea - secondarily fermented dark tea, from hand-picked young shoots and leaves, earthy taste with a distinctive aroma. Vilgain Pu-Erh te…
items.raw_desc: Tea Vilgain Pu-Erh tea, 50 g:Vilgain Pu-Erh tealoose black tea, 50 gVilgain Pu-Erh Tea - secondarily fermented dark tea, from hand-picked young shoots and leaves, earthy taste with a distinctive aroma.                     Vilgain Pu-Erh teaVilgain Pu-erh is a traditional Chinese dark tea made from the large-leaved variety of the Camellia sinensis var. assamica from the southwestern province of Yunnan. It is characterised by its bright red colour, delicate earthy flavour and distinctive aroma characteristic of the higher grades of Yunnan teas. Pu-erh is produced by the modern shou (ripe) production method, which uses rapid controlled microbial fermentation, called. wet-piling (wu-doi). This speeds up the entire production process, which traditionally took several decades (sheng method). The tea leaves are then dried, pressed and left to mature. Unlike commonly available Pu-erh teas, VIlgain Pu-erh is made from tiny, golden tips (young shoots) and young, tender leaves, making it a higher class of tea.                     Key Features of...

items.raw_desc: Fogkrém NORDICS Sensitive természetes remineralizáló hidroxiapatittal, 75 ml:Sensitive hydroxyapatite toothpaste contains hydroxyapatite, a natural mineral that makes up to 97% of human tooth enamel and bone. Hydroxyapatite is an amazing ingredient, also known as "liquid enamel", it has an extraordinary remineralizing effect on teeth. Hydroxyapatite has been shown to help resolve tooth sensitivity as its particles are absorbed into the tubules in the dentin and close the exposed areas, thus eliminating the pain and discomfort of sensitive teeth. The tubule filling process creates a new layer that remineralizes the enamel, protects its surface and prevents new decay. In addition to hydroxyapatite, Sensitive paste contains another very effective anti-sensitivity ingredient - potassium nitrate. It is a natural substance with a proven effect against tooth sensitivity. Potassium ions penetrate the exposed tubules in the dentin and reach the nerves of the tooth. Over time, the accumulated potassium ions eliminate painful sensitivity in the dental pulp, making it more resistant to...

The fluffy consistency spreads easily and gradually dissolves on contact with the skin, so it is well absorbed and leaves the skin soft and supple. The formula helps to hydrate, nourish and support the skin's natural regeneration. The body butter is suitable for all skin types, including dry and sensitive skin. Thanks to its gentle formula, it can also be used on skin prone to eczema or psoriasis. It also scents the skin with a sweet crème brûlée-inspired scent with hints of vanilla and almond. The entire protective pad can be cleaned in the washing machine. Fits standard car seats, including those which are located at the front, just like you, that point backwards, fitted with ISOFIX. A hajfesték SalonPlex technológiát tartalmaz, amely helyreállítja a sérült hajszálak kötéseit és belülről regenerálja a hajat. Ideální je se při hraní uvolnit, což vám umožní tvořit povedený tón.
